issues.message: <div> has an interactive handler but is not a native interactive element.
issues.recommendation: Replace it with a button/link or add role, tabIndex and keyboard handling.

issues.message: <div> handles click events without an equivalent keyboard event.
issues.recommendation: Add onKeyDown/onKeyUp handling or convert the element to a native button/link.

issues.message: Visual modal overlay does not expose dialog semantics.
issues.recommendation: Add role="dialog", aria-modal="true" and connect the dialog title with aria-labelledby.
issues.snippet: <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/70 p-4">

issues.message: Icon-only button has no accessible name.
issues.recommendation: Add aria-label or visible text that explains the action.

issues.message: <div> uses mouse-leave behavior without a matching blur event.
issues.recommendation: Pair mouse-leave behavior with onBlur for keyboard users.
issues.snippet: <div className="mt-2 flex w-fit gap-2" onMouseLeave={() => setHoveredRating(0)}>

issues.message: <button> uses hover behavior without a matching focus event.
issues.recommendation: Pair hover behavior with onFocus for keyboard users.
